markdown:
# FPIQ equity Research View

Research-only note: This report is for market research only and does not provide investment advice, trade recommendations, position sizing, execution instructions, or portfolio changes. Predictions are probabilistic statements about future observable market quantities, not trade recommendations. Acting on them is the reader's decision.

Generated: 2026-06-15T14:30:00.000Z
Evidence Quality: medium
Report Integrity: high
Research Quality: medium
Research Quality Driver: news lacks corroboration; regulatory filing evidence stale; remediation: add a second current news source or rerun; rerun with current regulatory filings

## Summary

Fixture Quarterly FPI N.V. synthetic FPI fixture replayed through current equity research stages.


## Key Findings

- FPIQ has deterministic market and verified close evidence. [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq] [verified-snapshot-FPIQ]

## Bull Case

- No sourced items.

## Bear Case

- No sourced items.

## Risks

- Current structured SEC normalization does not support the fixture filing forms. [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq]

## Catalysts

- No sourced items.


## Scenarios

- **Reference:** FPIQ remains within the deterministic fixture evidence envelope. [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq]

## Business Framework

Phase: hyper-growth

- **Business** (criteria-supported): Business criteria-supported \(Revenue $420.0M, Gross profit $357.0M, Operating income $294.0M\) [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals]
- **Phase**: Phase classification \(Phase hyper-growth, Revenue YoY 40.0%\) [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals] [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq]
- **Moat** (criteria-supported): Moat criteria-supported \(Gross margin 85.0%, Operating margin 70.0%\) [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals]
- **Growth** (criteria-supported): Growth criteria-supported \(Revenue YoY 40.0%, Operating income YoY 40.0%, Net income YoY 40.0%\) [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals]
- **Management** (insufficient-data): Management insufficient-data
- **Risk** (criteria-supported): Risk criteria-supported \(Debt/market cap 19.5%\) [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals] [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq] [verified-snapshot-FPIQ]
- **Valuation** (criteria-not-supported): Valuation criteria-not-supported \(Trailing PE 31.00x, Forward PE 28.00x, EV/revenue 13.76x\) [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq] [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals]

- **FPIQ Valuation Evidence:** Valuation Evidence: market cap $20.0B, enterprise value $23.1B, 3-month revenue $420.0M, annualized revenue $1.7B, EV/annualized revenue 13.76x, market cap/annualized revenue 11.90x, debt/market cap 0.20x, net debt/market cap 0.16x; market cap as of 2026-06-15; cash/debt as of 2026-03-31. Peer comps supportability: screening-only; 0 usable peers. [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq] [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals]
- **FPIQ Yahoo Fundamentals Evidence:** Yahoo Fundamentals: trailing PE 31.00x, forward PE 28.00x, price/book 45.00x, EPS TTM 6.40. [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq]
- **FPIQ Financial Lens Evidence:** Financial Lens Evidence: Quality criteria-supported \(Gross margin 85.0%, Operating margin 70.0%, Net margin 55.0%, Cash conversion 1.09x\); Growth criteria-supported \(Revenue YoY 40.0%, Gross profit YoY 40.0%, Operating income YoY 40.0%, Net income \(attrib.\) YoY 40.0%\); Financial Strength criteria-mixed \(Cash $780.0M, Debt $3.9B, Net debt $3.1B, Debt/market cap 19.5%\); Value criteria-not-supported \(Enterprise value $23.1B, Annualized revenue $1.7B, EV/revenue 13.76x, Market cap/revenue 11.90x\); Momentum criteria-mixed \(Latest close $217, SMA50 206.80, RSI14 100.00, MACD histogram 0.00\). [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals] [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq] [verified-snapshot-FPIQ]
- **FPIQ Business Framework Evidence:** Business Framework: Business criteria-supported \(Revenue $420.0M, Gross profit $357.0M, Operating income $294.0M\); Phase classification \(Phase hyper-growth, Revenue YoY 40.0%\); Moat criteria-supported \(Gross margin 85.0%, Operating margin 70.0%\); Growth criteria-supported \(Revenue YoY 40.0%, Operating income YoY 40.0%, Net income YoY 40.0%\); Management insufficient-data; Risk criteria-supported \(Debt/market cap 19.5%\); Valuation criteria-not-supported \(Trailing PE 31.00x, Forward PE 28.00x, EV/revenue 13.76x\). [extended-sec-edgar-fpiq-fundamentals] [market-yahoo-equity-fpiq] [verified-snapshot-FPIQ]
